title: laburnum alpinum var. pendulum
intro: Laburnum alpinum var. pendulum, also known as the weeping golden chain tree, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that is a variant of the Laburnum alpinum tree, characterized by its pendulous branches and golden flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, due to the presence of cytisine and other alkaloids. The health benefits of Laburnum alpinum var. pendulum include reducing anxiety, stress, and promoting a good night's sleep, while also being used to treat digestive issues and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from the leaves and flowers, which are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
